title: OAuth Account Manager
description: A simple minecraft account manager that lets you switch minecraft accounts easily ingame
body:
With this mod you can easily manage multiple minecraft accounts and switch between them ingame. ### This mod require [uteamcore](https://modrinth.com/mod/u-team-core)!

Add you minecraft accounts easily and secure with oauth in your browser. ![Overview of OAuth Account Manager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NjkiUiZ7/images/d8e702e2d84829a7719cb4e87336db87a795e8f3.png) Switch between the accounts with the use account button. This mod can be packed in every modpack you want.
[Sourcecode](https://github.com/MC-U-Team/OAuth-Account-Manager) is linked above and is available under Apache License 2.0.
Report Bugs on github.
